    • Class java.rmi.RemoteException extends java.io.IOException implements Serializable

      serialVersionUID:
      -5148567311918794206L

      • Serialized Fields

        • detail

          java.lang.Throwable detail
          Nested Exception to hold wrapped remote exception.

          This field predates the general-purpose exception chaining facility.

           
          Since:
          JDK1.1
